tagline: You can now use the Databricks Genie mobile app to access Genie One from iOS and Android devices.
what_it_does: You can now use the Databricks Genie mobile app to access Genie One from iOS and Android devices. Download the app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store. Using the Genie mobile app, you can: Ask data questions in natural language.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: You can now use the Databricks Genie mobile app to access Genie One from iOS and Android devices.
